resources.string: 1. Place update.zip in the root directory of sdcard and select the specified firmware upgrade package to upgrade[silence]
2. Insert the U disk and ensure that the update.zip file exists under the U disk to confirm the upgrade [Pop-up window]
*The signature in the firmware needs to match the current system firmware
*Please do not operate the system interface during firmware upgrade process, wait for the upgrade to complete
*Check whether the update.zip file is corrupt when upgrading using USB flash drive
*When the firmware upgrade exception cannot enter the system, please keep the phenomenon during the upgrade exception and inform our company to handle it.
*Use a stable USB cable or charger
